items.title: Time-domain simulations for space-based gravitational-wave detectors
items.summary: The main Taiji/LISA time-domain SGWB analysis is close to manuscript form, with detector response, TDI channels, FD/TD comparisons, astrophysical-background validation, sound-wave inference, and scalar-model interpretation already drafted.
tasks: Finalize the equal-arm versus unequal-arm TD comparison and its physical interpretation.
Keep the recent XYZ full-covariance multirealization outputs synchronized with the paper figures.
Preserve environment, figure, table, and data provenance for reproducibility.
items.source: Local manuscript and server lisa_td_paper_codex snapshot

items.title: SPIIR pipeline analysis
items.summary: The existing SPIIR coherent postcoh and FAR pipeline has been traced from online command configuration through CUDA postcoh statistics, background maps, rank/FAP, FAR assignment, and FinalSink behavior.
tasks: Turn the current formula and code-path notes into a compact English technical description.
Separate current pipeline evidence from proposed single-detector LLR/rank/FAR modifications.
Define the coordinated code changes required before the new branch can become an end-to-end pipeline.
items.source: Local SPIIR pipe notes plus server /home/genshin/spiir commit 3ccc23575

items.title: DWD foreground-noise injection for space-based detectors
items.summary: The response-first injection design is documented, and the 29-million-source Sangria/Taiji TDI2 SNR scan has completed with 17,448 sources selected above SNR 10.
tasks: Move from SNR selection to explicit summed six-link response-cache injection.
Produce final foreground A/E/T data products for downstream stochastic-background inference.
Keep resolved and unresolved Galactic-binary populations traceable to catalog masks.

items.title: LIGO calibration uncertainty in stochastic-background analysis
items.summary: The calibration work has been reconstructed into an English manuscript and report covering estimator-level, strain-level, insertion-point, physical-parameter, and Bayesian-marginalization branches.
tasks: Clean known implementation caveats around AddToStrain path handling.
Condense the long technical report into a submission-ready narrative.
Retain the distinction between post-processing calibration and strain-level calibration effects.
items.source: Local calibration manuscript and server /home/genshin/calib_paper figure snapshot

items.title: Triplet scalar model: collider and gravitational-wave constraints
items.summary: The triplet-scalar scan is live on the server, with 521,030 completed rows out of 574,839 known rows, 490,077 valid rows, 354 timeouts, and 50 active jobs in the latest checked log.
tasks: Continue the zoom-white scan and monitor timeout/invalid-region repairs.
Use the validated interpolation map and Bilby/dynesty outputs to connect GW posterior regions to (mSigma, a2).
Keep checkpoint traces and summary JSON files synchronized between server and local result folders.
